popularStory.headline: Samuel Wright - Margaret Stratton
popularStory.description: Samuel was born 9 Oct 1609 in Wrightsbridge, Essex, England, the son of John Wright and Martha Castell. He married Margaret 10 Sep 1625.  She was born about 1604 in England. They immigrated to the Col …

zh.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright於大約1595年出生在英國英格蘭。他於大約1622年與Margaret在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1641年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德且於1656年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他於1639年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德被列為minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon。他去世於1665年10月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年71歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright于大约1595年出生在英国英格兰。他于大约1622年与Margaret在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1641年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德且于1656年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他于1639年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德被列为minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon。他去世于1665年10月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年71岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright was born about 1595, in England, United Kingdom. He married Margaret about 1622, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1641 and Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1656. In 1639, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 17 October 1665, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright est né environ 1595, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Margaret environ 1622, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1641 et à Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1656. En 1639, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1665, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright wurde um 1595 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1622 in England Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1641 hat er in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1656 in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1639, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1665 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright è nato il circa 1595 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Margaret circa 1622, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1641 e nel Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1656. Nel 1639, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 17 ottobre 1665, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Wrightは約1595年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。約1622年にイギリスでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1641年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドに，1656年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンに住んでいた。1639年，45歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでの職業はminister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deaconと記録されている。彼は1665年10月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで71歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스플링필드
ko.Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴
ko.Church of St John Baptist, Hillingdon, M: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 힐링던 스트 존 바프티스트
ko.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright(은)는 대략 1595년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1622년 영국에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1641년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스플링필드에서, 1656년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 살았다. 1639년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스플링필드에서 minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon이었다. 그는 1665년 10월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright nasceu aproximadamente 1595, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Margaret aproximadamente 1622, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1641 e em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1656. Em 1639, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1665, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright родился около 1595 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1622 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1641 году и в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1656 году. В 1639 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 17 октября 1665 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright nació aproximadamente 1595, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Margaret aproximadamente 1622, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1641 y en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1656. En 1639, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era minister of religion, not correct, although he did earn the title of deacon en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1665, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
